mapper.select: SELECT status.available_quantity, status.hold_quantity, status.unavailable_quantity, CASE WHEN status.total_quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(status.available_quantity * 100 / status.total_quantity) END AS available_ratio, CASE WHEN status.total_quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(status.hold_quantity * 100 / status.total_quantity) END AS hold_ratio, CASE WHEN status.total_quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(status.unavailable_quantity * 100 / status.total_quantity) END AS unavailable_ratio FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS available_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS hold_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unavailable_quantity, COUNT(*) AS total_quantity FROM tb_pc_part_unit u WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' ) status

SELECT todo.type, todo.label, todo.title, todo.count, todo.part_id, todo.category_name, todo.route FROM ( SELECT 1 AS sort_order, 'INSPECTION_WAITING' AS type, '검수 대기' AS label, p.part_id, c.category_name, CONCAT(p.part_name, CASE WHEN p.model_name IS NOT NULL AND p.model_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', p.model_name) ELSE '' END) AS title, COUNT(*) AS count, 'inspection' AS route FROM tb_pc_part_unit u INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' GROUP BY p.part_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS sort_order, 'STOCK_HOLD' AS type, '출고 보류' AS label, p.part_id, c.category_name, CONCAT(p.part_name, CASE WHEN p.model_name IS NOT NULL AND p.model_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', p.model_name) ELSE '' END) AS title, COUNT(*) AS count, 'outbound' AS route FROM tb_pc_part_unit u INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.sales_status = 'HOLD' GROUP BY p.part_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS sort_order, 'STOCK_UNAVAILABLE' AS type, '출고 불가' AS label, p.part_id, c.category_name, CONCAT(p.part_name, CASE WHEN p.model_name IS NOT NULL AND p.model_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', p.model_name) ELSE '' END) AS title, COUNT(*) AS count, 'outbound' AS route FROM tb_pc_part_unit u INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' GROUP BY p.part_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name ) todo WHERE todo.count > 0 ORDER BY todo.sort_order ASC, todo.count DESC, todo.title ASC LIMIT #{size}
